TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241552. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 4 side a of tape: A mixture of songs (with brief introductions) to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) Song of First Ancestors; 2) Cheating Husband; 3) Lady Sings Very Well; 4) Love Song of Wari-an Villages; 5) Love Song of Ta-She. Recorded in Aug 1965.
